guides.title: Use questionnaire templates and subject-bound items as a reusable collection layer
guides.summary: The questionnaires plugin owns the reusable template and answer model that domain plugins can apply to vendor reviews and future collection workflows.
body: Keep product-specific review logic in the domain plugin, but reuse questionnaire templates, typed response rules, section grouping, subject-bound items, answer library entries, brokered collection requests, and item-level attachment semantics from the questionnaires plugin.
A template defines the repeatable questionnaire structure. Subject-bound items hold the real answers, statuses, follow-up notes, and any attachment expectations for one concrete workflow subject.

concepts.label: Questionnaire template
concepts.summary: A reusable questionnaire definition that can be applied to one or more workflow subjects.
when_to_use: Use templates to keep recurring reviews and collections consistent.
Use template items to define question order, section titles, expected response type, and optional guidance.

concepts.label: Questionnaire subject item
concepts.summary: One concrete questionnaire item attached to a real workflow subject such as a vendor review.
when_to_use: Use subject items for real answers, review status, and follow-up notes.
A subject item may be created manually or copied from a questionnaire template item.
Use item-level attachment settings when a question expects a supporting document or evidence file and you want controlled promotion into governed evidence later.

concepts.label: Questionnaire answer library entry
concepts.summary: A reusable answer snippet stored for one organization, subject family, and response type.
when_to_use: Save an answer when reviewers keep reusing the same baseline response across similar questionnaires.
Use answer library entries as reviewer suggestions, not as automatic truth copied without review.

concepts.label: Questionnaire brokered request
concepts.summary: A brokered collection record used when an internal broker gathers questionnaire answers off-platform for one concrete workflow subject.
when_to_use: Use a brokered request when you do not want to grant direct portal access but still need a tracked collection step.
Track contact, collection channel, broker, status, and broker notes so the later review still has a traceable intake path.
